definitions.ACTIVE: Currently canonical, in operation, and not superseded
definitions.SUPERSEDED: Replaced by a newer artifact; retained for lineage tracing only
definitions.EXPERIMENTAL: Provisional; not yet admitted to canonical corpus; may be retracted
definitions.PARTIAL: Exists but incomplete or known to be missing required components
definitions.REJECTED: Explicitly excluded from architecture or corpus
definitions.UNKNOWN: Cannot determine lifecycle state from available evidence
